reasoning: According to Billboard publications up to April 2026, Taylor Swift's album 'The Life of a Showgirl' debuted at No. 1 on the Billboard 200 chart dated October 18, 2025. It subsequently spent its first seven consecutive weeks at No. 1. The resolution criteria state that the market resolves to the lowest bracket (0) if the album does not debut as #1 or is not released by the end of 2025. Since the album debuted at No. 1 and maintained the top spot for seven consecutive weeks, the "0 straight weeks" bracket is demonstrably false and will resolve to NO.
